description: V17 strong opening. First 7 cards form the launch hand and keep Energy Switch in hand, because opponent mulligan draws shift the prize block and can otherwise prize the bridge card. Cards after the controlled prize block provide discard fuel, Grass, VSTAR search safety, and anti-Boss escape. Goal: T1 active Regidrago V with Teal Mask Ogerpon support, attach Fire to Regidrago, Ogerpon draws Grass resources, Ultra Ball discards Dragapult ex plus a Dragon fuel card for Regidrago VSTAR, then T2 evolve, attach Grass, Energy Switch Ogerpon Grass, and use Apex Dragon. Default conversion copies Dragapult ex for 200 plus 6 counters; when Iron Hands ex or another bulky 230 HP threat is active, copy Hisuian Goodra VSTAR if available to survive the return hit. The real Switch card is kept out of prizes so Star Legacy can recover an escape card if the opponent Bosses Ogerpon active.
